title: wolfhsm-src: build.rs
description: Implement wolfhsm-src/build.rs: locate source tree via WOLFHSM_SRC or ~/GIT/wolfHSM (panic with clear message if missing); accept WOLFSSL_INCLUDE_DIR + WOLFSSL_SETTINGS_INCLUDE env vars; compile all 20 src/ files (wh_comm.c, wh_message_comm/crypto/keystore/nvm/counter/auth/she.c, wh_client.c, wh_client_crypto/nvm/cryptocb/keywrap/auth/cert/she.c, wh_keyid/lock/log/utils.c) and 7 port/posix/ files; include paths: wolfhsm root, port/posix, wolfssl_include, wolfssl_settings; compile flag -DWOLFHSM_CFG_NO_WOLFCRYPT=0; emit cargo:INCLUDE and cargo:LIB; rerun-if-env-changed for all env vars. Note: wh_message.c does not exist — use individually named files.
